input.topic: Twitter 2020 incident canonical merge and legacy redirect cleanup
input.notes: Corpus review confirmed that `twitter-bitcoin-scam-hack-2020.md` and `twitter-social-engineering-attack-2020.md` described the same July 15, 2020 Twitter compromise. The duplicate slug was retired in favor of the broader social-engineering canonical article. Follow up by checking internal references, search snippets, and any residual wording drift introduced by the merge.

history.note: Queued follow-on cleanup after duplicate Twitter 2020 incident coverage was collapsed into a single canonical article with a legacy redirect.
